					 About Us				
		
		
				
																														
				
									Kinetic Software is the go-to technology partner for operations management in the higher education, conferencing, and events industries. We’re dedicated to enhancing student accommodation and event management through innovative solutions that elevate operational efficiency and the customer experience.								
				
									Our approach to streamlining operations is rooted in the agile and dynamic principles that our name embodies. At Kinetic Software, we keep pace with the ever-evolving landscape of modern businesses, institutions, and communities, adapting swiftly to new challenges and anticipating worthwhile opportunities.								
				
																														
				
							
					
				
						
		
				
									“Kinetic” resonates with the vibrant energy of the organisations we serve, from bustling university campuses to dynamic corporate environments. We embrace the rhythm of your institution and channel it into efficient, responsive solutions that evolve with your needs, creating an environment where productivity soars, customers are satisfied, and communities flourish.We turn potential into progress, propelling your organisation forward. It’s more than just software — it’s a transformative approach to operational excellence.								
				
					It’s the Kinetic Way.				
				
				
		
				
							
					
				
						
				
							
					
				
						
				
									Our approach to streamlining operations is rooted in the agile and dynamic principles that our name embodies. At Kinetic Software, we keep pace with the ever-evolving landscape of modern businesses, institutions, and communities, adapting swiftly to new challenges and anticipating worthwhile opportunities.								
				
									Kinetic Software is the go-to technology partner for operations management in the higher education, conferencing, and events industries. We’re dedicated to enhancing student accommodation and event management through innovative solutions that elevate operational efficiency and the customer experience.								
				
							
					
				
						
				
				
					
				
		
					
		
				
					History				
				
																														
				
		
				
					History				
				
									Founded in 1998 by Chris Wildsmith and Steve Ashley, Kinetic Software has proudly served the higher education sector for over 25 years. With a fierce passion for innovation and unwavering commitment to customer success, we work with 350 institutions worldwide and continue to push the boundaries of what’s possible in operations. In 2015, Kinetic Software formed a strategic partnership with the Volaris Group. This move added long-term stability and supported our critical competitive advantage in the higher education sector, strengthening our position as a trusted global leader in delivering software that adapts to your unique needs.Our journey of becoming an industry leader in comprehensive operational solutions has deepened our devotion to solving your problems. We’re continuing on a much larger scale with greater resources and a more profound commitment to meeting your needs.								
				
					
				
		
		
				
				
					

		
		
		
		

   
      

   
  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
				
					2001				
				
					Revolutionised event management				
				
									We cleared paper-filled conference team desks and office filing cabinets with our conferencing management solution, KxConferencing.								
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
				
					2003				
				
					Changed the residential management				
				
									We began the summer bedroom revolution with residential bedroom management, KxResidential.								
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
				
					2005				
				
					Did our bit for saving the environment!				
				
									We started saving trees, replacing 40-page accommodation contracts with a simple online contracts process. Imagine how many trees been saved in the last 15 years!								
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
				
					2008				
				
					Took catering management to the next level				
				
									We wetted the whistle of education staff and their visitors across the UK with our campus delivered catering online portal! More tea, Sir? We also started our global journey by launching our operation in USA.								
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
				
					2010				
				
					Maximised student experience				
				
									We kicked-off the year by making stressful arrivals days a thing of the past with mobile Arrivals Passes; saving parents and university staff across the world the anguish of traffic management and unnecessary queuing.								
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
				
					2012				
				
					Fully stepped into logistics...				
				
									As online shopping accelerated, ‘next-day’ deliveries remain next day and prevent accommodation offices becoming new storage solutions, courtesy of KxParcels.								
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
				
					2014				
				
					It's not a "proposal", it's the solution				
				
									The commercial competition intensifies but thanks to KxProposals business development teams stay one-step ahead with data-driven proposal generation and analytics. We also celebrated our 300th customer!								
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
				
					2016				
				
					Revolutionising things for commercial teams				
				
									Kinetic saves universities thousands of hours in repetitive strain injury claims as BedBooker does the heavy lifting with a two-way live-interface with over 90 online travel agents.The desktop ball and chains are removed for commercial operation teams with KxMobile.								
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
				
					2018				
				
					King of student accommodation				
				
									We acquired Occam and expanded our student accommodation portfolio with a powerful tool, Room Service. Now we manage student accommodation for over 80% of universities in the UK and Ireland!								
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
				
					2020				
				
					What a year! On many levels...				
				
									Rothamsted Enterprises became our first customer to join Kinetic Pulse, our brand new cloud-based platform. Our student wellbeing management solution, Student Life, made a real difference to the student mental health crisis.								
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
					
				
				
		
              
              
      

  

    
          	
  
      	
        
      	

    

          
            			
			
					
				
					2022				
				
					Making major leaps to empower our customers for success				
				
									Making major leaps to empower our customers for success We developed a brand new customer-centric team, Customer Success, with a focus on empowering our customers to gain maximum benefit from their Kx products and reach their desired business outcomes. We’re continuing on a much larger scale with greater resources and a more profound commitment to meeting your needs.

									We started saving trees, replacing 40-page accommodation contracts with a simple online contracts process. Imagine how many trees been saved in the last 15 years!

					Took catering management to the next level				
				
									We wetted the whistle of education staff and their visitors across the UK with our campus delivered catering online portal! More tea, Sir? We also started our global journey by launching our operation in USA.

					Power your operations with Kinetic				
				
									For over 25 years, our operations management software has gained the trust of leaders in student accommodation, purpose-built student accommodation (PBSA), catering, and venue management worldwide.								
				
									Developed by our team of experts with first-hand industry experience, we offer unwavering support and innovative solutions to meet your current and future technological needs.								
				
				
																														
				
									For over 25 years, our operations management software has gained the trust of leaders in student accommodation, purpose-built student accommodation (PBSA), catering, and venue management worldwide.Developed by our team of experts with firsthand industry experience, we offer unwavering support and innovative solutions to meet your current and future technological needs.

					Student   Accommodation Management				
		
		
				
																														
				
		
				
					We’re #1 for a reason.				
				
									Over 80% of HE institutions work with Kinetic because:								
				
							
							
											
													
										We build smarter student management solutions
									
								
											
													
										We’re rated #1 by APUC for value and system capabilities
									
								
											
													
										We put students at the heart of innovation by creating tools with them, not just for them
									
						
						
				
				
					
				
				
						
				
							
				
					
				
					With Kinetic’s  student management software, you can:				
		
		
		
				
																														
				
									Streamline Your Operations								
				
									Manage everything from the moment students apply till they leave your accommodation, with the right data synced and accessible from wherever you are in the Kinetic ecosystem. Our software is designed to support you to make every day seamless, productive and results-driven.								
				
				
		
		
				
																														
				
									Enhance Student Engagement								
				
									Today’s students expect fast, convenient, and personalised experiences. Our student tools can elevate their engagement and foster a strong, vibrant community that leaves a lasting impression.								
				
				
		
		
				
																														
				
									Optimise Resource Management								
				
									Efficient resource allocation is key to success. Our tools enable you to track usage, schedule maintenance, and manage inventory effortlessly. By leveraging real-time analytics, you can minimise waste, reduce costs, and ensure that all resources are utilised effectively, contributing to a sustainable environment.

									KxStudent								
				
					Go Beyond  Surface-Level Operations Management				
				
									Today’s students expect fast, convenient, and personalised experiences. Our student tools can elevate their engagement and foster a strong, vibrant community that leaves a lasting impression.								
				
				
																														
		
				
									Facing these accommodation headaches?								
		
		
				
																														
				
									Students frustrated by confusing room applications and long wait times								
				
		
				
																														
				
									Staff buried in manual room assignments and contract processing								
				
		
				
																														
				
									Important messages lost in cluttered email chains								
				
		
				
																														
				
									Financial tracking spread across multiple systems								
				
				
				
		
				
									KxStudent streamlines every step								
		
		
				
																														
				
									One-click bedroom allocations that match student preferences automatically								
				
		
				
																														
				
									Digital contracts and payments that update in real-time								
				
		
				
																														
				
									Live occupancy reporting showing exactly which rooms are available								
				
		
				
																														
				
									Built-in messaging that reaches students where they are — SMS, email, or app								
				
		
				
																														
				
									Clear financial dashboards tracking every payment and invoice								
				
		
				
																														
				
									Automated reports that spot retention risks early								
				
				
				
		
				
									KxStudent connects directly with your existing student records and payment systems. Your data stays accurate across platforms, and your staff can focus on what matters most: supporting students.Book a demo to see how much time you could save.								
				
										
						
									Request a demo
					
					
								
				
					
				
				
		                    
		        
                    
				        		
				
					
		
				
									KxWelcome								
				
					Making  
Campus Accommodation  Work for You				
				
									When your residential staff spends more time fighting software than helping residents, something’s wrong. KxWelcome consolidates everything into a single, intuitive platform that anyone can use from day one.								
				
				
																														
		
				
									What’s holding you back?								
		
		
				
																														
				
									Your team copying and pasting data between multiple systems								
				
		
				
																														
				
									Critical messages never reaching their target								
				
		
				
																														
				
									Website accessibility issues frustrating potential residents								
				
				
				
		
				
									KxWelcome streamlines every step								
		
		
				
																														
				
									All-in-one platform solution that integrates with your existing systems, complete with API access for custom needs
